arts.ttl: How ginger shots, Fantastic Mr Fox and science homework helped Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk get over Champions League heartbreak and prepare for another Wembley final
arts.sum: INTERVIEW BY LEWIS STEELE: The uber-professional, tunnel-visioned Virgil van Dijk could probably write a best-selling book on high performance, psychology and physical recovery.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk ‘fully committed’ to Liverpool despite contract stalemate
arts.sum: The defender is out of contract in the summer but has made no secret of his desire to remain on Merseyside.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk insists he 'does not know' what will happen about his Liverpool future but insists 'there is no need to panic' - with Reds captain still yet to agree a new deal beyond this season
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: Virgil van Dijk has urged Liverpool fans to not panic or feel anxious over his unsolved future - and channel all their energy into backing the team to winning the Carabao Cup final.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot hints at Liverpool’s Carabao Cup final goalkeeper after Caoimhin Kelleher’s past heroics
arts.sum: Alisson has been the Reds’ clear No 1 this season, but Kelleher started in victorious finals in 2022 and 2024

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk on family, Jurgen Klopp's final trophy and being a Wembley hero
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk sat down for an interview before Sunday's Carabao Cup final as he opened up on his home lift, Wembley memories of last season and what it means to be skipper

arts.ttl: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk responds to Wayne Rooney after 'lazy' criticism
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney said Virgil van Dijk 'got lazy' for Ousmane Dembele's goal for PSG in Liverpool's Champions League defeat but the defender doesn't believe so

arts.ttl: Newcastle's midfield monsters will be the difference makers against Liverpool, writes MARTIN KEOWN
arts.sum: MARTIN KEOWN: The 1974 FA Cup final between Liverpool and Newcastle is the reason I got into football. It was the first final I watched and I was captivated by the emotion of both sets of fans.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United star reveals how Wembley sadness will fuel him in Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: But now he is keen to not only make up for lost time this season, but also ensure that the memories of the 2023 Carabao Cup final are erased. However, Joelinton told reporters that he was fuelled by the defeat to Man United and does not want to sample the same horrible empty feeling after the game.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Transfer News: Reds line up club-record bid for Julian Alvarez
arts.sum: Anfield Watch and FootballTransfers can reveal that Liverpool are massive admirers of Atletico Madrid striker Julian Alvarez . Liverpool line up CLUB-RECORD bid for Julian Alvarez

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Newcastle predictions: Who will win the 2024-25 EFL Cup final?
arts.sum: Ahead of Sunday's EFL Cup final between Liverpool and Newcastle United, the Sports Mole team discusses who they think will win the trophy at Wembley.
